title: Task Signal
description: The caller-supplied matchable signal for one selection request (SEL-01). Mirrors the three positive trigger axes locked in Phase 1 (D-01): taskType matched by enum equality (D-04), keywords + paths free-form arrays the trigger gate matches against. additionalProperties:false + required rejects a malformed signal loudly rather than letting select() run over garbage and silently under-inject (02-RESEARCH Pitfall 8, threat T-2-BADSIGNAL). There is NO free-form text field — callers pre-tokenize prose into keywords.

taskType.description: D-04: matched by enum equality. Single-sourced conceptually from the frontmatter schema's taskTypeArray enum — a Phase 2 taskType change stays a one-line edit here and there.

keywords.description: Pre-tokenized free-text terms. The trigger gate matches a rule's keyword axis as a case-insensitive substring of any signal keyword (D-04).

paths.description: Touched file paths. The trigger gate matches a rule's paths axis via picomatch globs against each signal path (D-04).
